name: Tyrone Williams
description:
Tyrone grew up deep in Zone 3, Atlanta, where survival came before everything. Raised by the streets, he learned early you either eat or get ate.

Most days you catch him posted in the cut , watching who slide through his hood. New faces don't get welcomed; they get checked. In a place where loyalty is rare and death come quick, Tyrone stay ready, stay dangerous.
creator: Alina~~
